phrases.text_local: Je suis touriste. Comment faire la détaxe ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh swee too-REEST. koh-MAHN FEHR lah day-TAHKS
phrases.cultural_note: Non-EU residents can get 12% VAT refund on purchases over 100 euros from the same store. The détaxe counter is on the ground floor. Bring your passport.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the personal shopper service
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous un service de personal shopper ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY voo uhn sehr-VEES duh per-soh-NAL SHOH-pair
phrases.cultural_note: Galeries Lafayette offers free personal shopping appointments in multiple languages. Book in advance online or ask at the welcome desk on the ground floor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the rooftop terrace
phrases.text_local: Comment accéder à la terrasse panoramique ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ahk-say-DAY ah lah teh-RAHS pah-noh-rah-MEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The rooftop terrace is free and open to the public. Take the elevator to the top floor. It has a stunning view of the Opéra Garnier and the Paris skyline.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where a specific brand is located
phrases.text_local: À quel étage se trouve la marque Chanel ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ay-TAHZH suh TROOV lah MARK shah-NEL
phrases.cultural_note: The store has three buildings: Coupole (women's fashion), Homme (men's), and Maison (home/gourmet). Ask at the welcome desk for a store map.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to see the famous glass dome
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on voir la coupole en verre ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN vwahr lah koo-POL ahn VEHR
phrases.cultural_note: The stunning Art Nouveau stained-glass dome (1912) is in the main Coupole building. Look up from the ground floor or view it from the upper balconies for the best effect.
